text: Can you tell me how to get my discount? I think there's a form, but I'm unsure.
I was promised a discount that I haven't received, what's going on?
I'm really frustrated! I can't access my account and I've tried so many times. My last password reset didn't work at all, and I’m feeling lost here.
Hey, I need a refund for my last order. It never arrived, and the tracking is stuck on 'in transit'.
I'd like to request a refund for my last purchase, please.
Hey, uh, can u tell me how to find my order? I think I missed the email.
I can't log in but I just reset my password, it should work. Why isn't it letting me in?
I can’t access my account anymore. I think I pressed something wrong? Help!

I recently logged into my account but I can't seem to retrieve my password despite following the reset instructions. Can you help me recover it? Though I don’t remember my old password, I might have used it for a different account.
I am experiencing difficulties accessing my account due to an unexpected error message. Can you assist me with this issue?

I'm really frustrated with the service I've been getting lately. It seems like my issues just never get resolved, and I feel like I'm just going in circles. I tried reaching out multiple times, but nothing has changed, and it's quite disappointing. Can someone please look into my situation more thoroughly?

I am writing to request a refund for my last purchase, which I had to cancel due to some unexpected issues. Despite following the necessary steps to terminate my subscription, it seems that the charge has still gone through. I would greatly appreciate if you could look into this matter and process my refund at your earliest convenience. Thank you.

Hello, I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to request a refund for my recent purchase. Unfortunately, the product did not meet my expectations as it was not as described on your website. I would appreciate your assistance in processing this refund. Additionally, I went ahead and tried to call the support number listed, but it was busy most of the time and I was unable to get through. Thank you for your attention to this matter.
app crashes when trying to save photos. it just freezez! rare bug for sure.
My app keeps crashing when I try to upload a file, and I don't know why. Also, my cat just knocked over my coffee, so now I have a mess to clean up.
I can't believe how slow your support team is. I've been waiting for a response forever!
My app keeps crashing when I try to open it. It was fine before, now it just won't start. What happened?
I am experiencing an issue with the software. It keeps crashing unexpectedly, and I have attached the error logs for your review. Please assist me in resolving this problem.
my app keeps crashing but also works fine sometimes. not sure what's wrong?

Hello! I hope you could help me out with something. I've got a question that's kind of bothering me. It's about the latest update you rolled out last month, you know, the one where my settings went all haywire and everything seemed to change overnight? I was wondering if there’s a way to revert it back to the previous version? It's just really inconvenient and, honestly, I can’t quite remember what was there before. Also, my friend mentioned something about a hidden feature but didn't elaborate. Can you provide any insights?
Hey, can you tell me if you guys deliver to Canada? I really want to know before signing up.
I can't log in, says my pw is wrong but I kno it is right. Help me!

I am writing to express my frustration regarding a recent order I placed. I was promised a delivery timeframe of two to three days, yet here I am, almost a week later, and my package has still not arrived. This delay is quite disappointing, especially since I had made plans based on the expected arrival. I would appreciate any information regarding the status of my order, as it seems to have vanished without a trace.
